channel.title: Lachlan Bailey (@lachlanbailey) public posts - Picnob
channel.description: Photographer represented worldwide by @artpartner - Powered by RSSHub

Printing @wildhackpost
Special thanks to @sydneyoperahouse

item.author: lachlanbailey

item.title: What a brilliant week in Sydney participating in @vogueaustralia forces of fashion at the Sydney Opera house. Proud of all the Australian talent, prou...
item.description:
What a brilliant week in Sydney participating in @vogueaustralia forces of fashion at the Sydney Opera house. Proud of all the Australian talent, proud of my friend @christinecentenera for pulling all this together, proud of my country and even a little proud of myself.
Thanks to the team at Vogue Australia & @paspaleypearls ❤️
📷 @darren_mcdonald @rob.tennent
item.author: lachlanbailey

item.title: Armed with a little Contax, a complete mess of film and lenses rolling around the seat and not able to see anything - I managed a few frames in focus ...
item.description:
Armed with a little Contax, a complete mess of film and lenses rolling around the seat and not able to see anything - I managed a few frames in focus !

Mulholland drive with Margot and Jacob for @vogueaustralia

EIC & styling @christinecentenera
Hair @brycescarlett
Makeup @patidubroff
Grooming @akgroomer
Nails @betina_goldstein
Tailoring #SusieCustomsDesigns
EP & talent @rikki_keene
Production @geprojects @charlottemelissarose @danicaosland
Art direction @arquiecooke
Color and printing @lachlanbailey @wildhackpost
Special thanks to @chateaumarmont @artpartner
#lachlanbailey #margotrobbie #jacobelordi
item.author: lachlanbailey

Thanks to the team @yslbeauty & @betcparis
#lachlanbailey #dualipa
item.author: lachlanbailey

Special thanks to @chateaumarmont @artpartner
#lachlanbailey #margotrobbie #jacobelordi
item.author: lachlanbailey

item.title: I just want to say how much of a pleasure it was to have an Australian majority on set — both in front of the camera and behind it.
item.description:
I just want to say how much of a pleasure it was to have an Australian majority on set — both in front of the camera and behind it.

It’s the third time I’ve worked with Margot, and although she’s become such a star, I always feel like I’m hanging out with a totally normal (albeit super-beautiful) friend. That’s what I love about Australians — no matter how successful: very little ego, no attitude, and just a desire to work hard and excel.

@vogueaustralia

EIC & styling @christinecentenera
Hair @brycescarlett
Makeup @patidubroff
Grooming @akgroomer
Nails @betina_goldstein
Tailoring #SusieCustomsDesigns
EP & talent @rikki_keene
Production @geprojects @charlottemelissarose @danicaosland
Art direction @arquiecooke
Color and printing @lachlanbailey @wildhackpost
Special thanks to @chateaumarmont @artpartner
#lachlanbailey #margotrobbie #jacobelordi
item.author: lachlanbailey
